$description: Derived from component CSS + doc page — do not edit by hand; regenerate with `node scripts/build-component-api.mjs`.
name: title-block
title: Title Block

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Added Figma ↔ code mapping (props) table to the Variants section — properties, values, and defaults sourced from the Stardust Components Figma library.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Subtitle type style changed Subtitle/Medium → Subtitle/Regular (font-weight 500 → 400; size/line-height unchanged at 14px/23px). Updated in components/title-block.css, spec, and platform notes. Figma update by design (Mason).

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Component CSS extracted to shared assets/css/components/title-block.css; duplicated Pill subset replaced by shared pill.css (avatar.css linked for composition); Accessibility table re-expanded; anatomy rebuilt as deconstructed stack with hover highlighting.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Title weight default: semibold → medium (500). Subtitle: 12px Regular → 14px Medium 500 (Subtitle/Medium style). Avatar size guide updated: title+subtitle → 56px avatar. Stacked comparison confirmed medium 500 title and medium 500 subtitle as correct.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Initial component page. Composite of Avatar + text content + Pills. Non-interactive display component. Avatar size guide documented. margin: 0 fix documented for main.css p-tag override. Built via component workshop workflow.

props.codeProp: pill slot — code: pills: string[] (empty = hidden)
